subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 745050426/240811269 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (CNRS/IN2P3/IJCLab) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 745050426/240811269 at 06:27:01.25 UT
on 11 August 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
